name: CONSTELLIUM SE
business: Constellium SE is a global leader in the development, manufacture and sale of high value-added specialty rolled and extruded aluminum products. The company serves the aerospace, space, defense, packaging, automotive, commercial transportation, and general industrial end-markets.

exposures.sentence: We are a global leader in the supply of advanced aluminum alloy plates, sheets and extrusions to the aerospace, space and defense industries.
We are a global leader in the supply of advanced aluminum alloy plates, sheets and extrusions to the aerospace, space and defense industries.
We are a global leader in the supply of advanced aluminum alloy plates, sheets and extrusions to the aerospace, space and defense industries.
We supply the automotive market with technically advanced products such as Auto Body Sheet (ABS), heat exchanger materials and battery foil products.
We supply the packaging market with canstock and closure stock for the beverage and food industry, as well as foilstock for the flexible packaging market.

Our A&T operating segment offers a wide range of technically advanced aluminum products including plate, sheet and extrusions to blue-chip customers in the global aerospace, space, defense, commercial transportation and general industrial sectors.

catalysts.sentence: Ms. Ingrid Joerg was appointed as Chief Executive Officer effective as of January 1, 2026.

catalysts.event: Loss of foreign private issuer status
catalysts.sentence: On June 30, 2025, the Company determined it no longer qualified as a foreign private issuer.

tamClaims.claim: Aluminum rolled products CAGR 3.6% from 2025 to 2030
tamClaims.sentence: According to CRU International Limited ( CRU ), the compound annual growth rate ( CAGR ) for aluminum rolled products between 2025 and 2030 is expected to be 3.6%.

tamClaims.claim: Aerospace aluminum rolled products growth 8.5% per annum from 2025 to 2030
tamClaims.sentence: According to CRU, demand for the aerospace aluminum rolled products markets in North America and Europe is expected to grow by 8.5% per annum from 2025 to 2030.

tamClaims.claim: Aluminum canstock market growth 2.8% (NA) and 3.5% (EU) per annum 2025-2030
tamClaims.sentence: According to CRU, demand for the aluminum canstock market in North America and Europe is expected to grow by 2.8% and 3.5% per annum between 2025 and 2030, respectively.

tamClaims.claim: ABS consumption growth 1.7% (NA) and 8.2% (EU) per annum 2025-2030
tamClaims.sentence: CRU estimates that the consumption of ABS in North America and Europe is expected to grow by 1.7% and 8.2% per annum between 2025 and 2030, respectively.

Between 2024 and 2044, Airbus predicts over 42,000 new aircraft across all categories of large commercial aircraft with 35% of sales of new airplanes to Europe and North America, 46% of sales of new airplanes to Asia Pacific and the remaining 19% to the Middle East, Latin America and Africa.

tamClaims.claim: Light vehicle production growth 1.7% (NA) and 1.5% (EU) per annum 2025-2030
tamClaims.sentence: According to industry research, light vehicle production is expected to grow in North America and Europe by approximately 1.7% and 1.5% per annum from 2025 to 2030, respectively.
